station_imaging_policy: Station-owned Mole FM IDs are interlaced before the station news intro and after the French news item before returning to live radio or approved fallback programming.
voice_policy: Voice generation prefers a quota-guarded premium ElevenLabs voice when configured. If premium voice is unavailable, the factory selects the most natural installed macOS voice, slows the read, removes production labels from the script, and applies radio mastering. Local fallback should be treated as preview audio, not the long-term broadcast target.

voice_quality_summary.next_upgrade: Configure ElevenLabs or local Piper high-quality voices with quota/storage guard for production-grade Mole FM host audio.

audio_delivery_policy: Mole FM serves smoothed low-bandwidth MP3 streams with station-owned Mole FM IDs stitched around the news voice, while keeping the premium voice master available as the archive copy.
